name: Hon. Gamini Waleboda, M.P.
academic_qualifications: G.C.E. (A/L) (ranked as District First in Commerce Stream - Ratnapura District); Degree of Bachelor of Business Administration, University of Sri Jayawardenapura; Postgraduate degree, University of Sri Jayawardenapura; Postgraduate Diploma, University of Colombo; Final Year professional in Chartered Accountancy
professional_qualifications: Exposure and knowledge from overseas such as - Training on e-governance and change management for IRD officers Sri Lanka at IRBM Malaysia - Investigation/ Assessment and International Taxation for Lanka at Direct Taxes Regional Training Institute Mumbai - Practical Issues of Tax Policy and tax Administration in Developing Countries at National Institute of Public Finance and Policy, New Delhi, India; Special study on Thailand and Singapore tax system; Served as a Visiting Lecturer in higher education institutions such as the Open University, Technical College and University of Sri Jayawaradenapura; Completed 1st Department Examination and 2nd Department Examination In Inland Revenue Department
